use_cases: Displaying FAQ sections with collapsible answers to reduce visual clutter
Organizing product details or feature explanations in e-commerce listings
Creating documentation sections with expandable code snippets or explanations
Building settings panels with grouped collapsible options
Creating navigation menus with expandable sub-sections
ai_summary: A flexible accordion component built on Radix UI primitives with multiple visual variants (default, outline, solid) and indicator options (arrow, plus, none). Features smooth open/close animations, accessibility support, and Tailwind CSS integration with CVA for variant management. Designed for general-purpose use in SaaS applications, documentation sites, and e-commerce platforms where space-efficient content organization is needed.
